title: rosa × scabriuscula subvar. subvillosa
intro: Rosa × scabriuscula subvar. subvillosa, a lesser-known subspecies of rose, is a hybrid shrub derived from the Rosa scabriuscula and Rosa villosa species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa × scabriuscula subvar. subvillosa include potential applications in cardiovascular and neuroprotective therapies, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Rosa × scabriuscula subvar. subvillosa typically involve the use of its leaves, stems, and flowers in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
